{
  "source_tables": [
    {"page": 49, "title": "Probability of Termination (by Age and Years of Service)",
     "row_labels": ["20", "25", "30", "35", "40", "45", "50", "55", "60"],
     "col_labels": ["0", "1", "2", "3", "4", "5+"],
     "cells": [
       [17.00, 15.00, 9.00, 8.00, 6.25, 5.50],
       [17.00, 15.00, 9.00, 8.00, 6.25, 5.50],
       [15.00, 11.25, 8.00, 6.75, 5.25, 4.50],
       [15.00, 8.75, 7.00, 5.50, 4.50, 3.50],
       [15.00, 7.50, 6.25, 4.50, 4.00, 2.75],
       [15.00, 6.50, 5.50, 4.50, 4.00, 2.25],
       [15.00, 6.50, 5.50, 4.50, 4.00, 2.00],
       [15.00, 6.50, 5.50, 4.50, 4.00, 2.00],
       [15.00, 6.50, 5.50, 4.50, 4.00, 2.00]
     ],
     "printed_row_totals": null,
     "printed_col_totals": null,
     "values_unit": "percent"}
  ],
  "row_map": [
    {"target": "25", "sources": ["25"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null},
    {"target": "30", "sources": ["30"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null},
    {"target": "35", "sources": ["35"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null},
    {"target": "40", "sources": ["40"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null},
    {"target": "45", "sources": ["45"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null},
    {"target": "50", "sources": ["50"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null},
    {"target": "55", "sources": ["55"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null},
    {"target": "60", "sources": ["60"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null},
    {"target": "65", "sources": ["60"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null},
    {"target": "70", "sources": ["60"], "op": "copy", "weights_table": null}
  ],
  "col_map": [
    {"target": "1", "sources": ["1"], "op": "copy"},
    {"target": "2", "sources": ["2"], "op": "copy"},
    {"target": "3", "sources": ["3"], "op": "copy"},
    {"target": "4", "sources": ["4"], "op": "copy"},
    {"target": "6", "sources": ["5+"], "op": "overlap_weighted", "source_spans": [[5, null]]},
    {"target": "8", "sources": ["5+"], "op": "overlap_weighted", "source_spans": [[5, null]]},
    {"target": "10", "sources": ["5+"], "op": "overlap_weighted", "source_spans": [[5, null]]},
    {"target": "11", "sources": ["5+"], "op": "overlap_weighted", "source_spans": [[5, null]]},
    {"target": "12", "sources": ["5+"], "op": "overlap_weighted", "source_spans": [[5, null]]},
    {"target": "30", "sources": ["5+"], "op": "overlap_weighted", "source_spans": [[5, null]]},
    {"target": "40", "sources": ["5+"], "op": "overlap_weighted", "source_spans": [[5, null]]}
  ],
  "derive": null,
  "transpose": false,
  "notes": "Source is Exhibit G.5 (page 49) 'Probability of Termination' by age (rows) x years of service (columns). Values are printed as percentages, so values_unit='percent'. Column 0 (service year 0) is excluded per target spec (service year 0 not part of template). Columns 1-4 are single service years mapping copy. The '5+' source column is an open-ended bin covering all service >=5, so every target service bucket at or above 5 (6,8,10,11,12,30,40) copies the '5+' rate via overlap_weighted (single span [5,null]). Age rows only go to 60 in the source; target ages 65 and 70 have no printed source beyond age 60, so they copy the age-60 row (rates flatten at ages >=45). Target age 25 copies the age-25 source row exactly. Rates are intensive - never summed."
}
